published_items.title: OpenAI releases GPT-5.6 Sol, Terra, and Luna in government-gated limited preview
key_facts: Three models: Sol (flagship), Terra (balanced), Luna (fastest)
All three rated High in bio and cybersecurity under Preparedness Framework
~20 government-approved preview companies
Sol self-reasoning control rate: 1.3%, tripled from prior generation
White House ONCD and OSTP requested access restriction on June 25
Sol introduces 'ultra' mode: subagent-based task parallelism

published_items.title: Claude Code v2.1.195 fixes background agent data loss and hook matcher bugs
key_facts: Background agent data loss in `claude agents` fixed
Hook matcher hyphenated identifier substring bug fixed (now exact-match only)
macOS voice dictation silence capture bug fixed
Japanese, Chinese, Thai auto-submit in space-free languages fixed
External plugin install consent prompt on every loader path fixed
New CLAUDE_CODE_DISABLE_MOUSE_CLICKS env var added

published_items.title: Anthropic accuses Alibaba of 28.8 million-exchange distillation attack on Claude
key_facts: 28.8 million exchanges with Claude
~25,000 fraudulent accounts
Campaign window: April 22 to June 5, 2026
Senate letter addressed to Tim Scott and Elizabeth Warren
Targeted capabilities: agentic reasoning, software engineering, long-horizon tasks
Alibaba denied allegations
Alibaba stock fell ~3% following disclosure
Described as largest known distillation attack; DeepSeek/Moonshot/MiniMax alleged in February 2026

published_items.title: Two more Google DeepMind researchers plan to join Anthropic
key_facts: Jonas Adler (AI coding lead at Google) planning to join Anthropic
Alexander Pritzel (pretraining researcher) planning to join Anthropic
Both are AlphaFold contributors alongside Nobel Prize winner John Jumper
John Jumper previously announced departure to Anthropic
Noam Shazeer (Gemini architect) recently joined OpenAI

published_items.title: Gemini 3.5 Pro launch pushed to July 2026
key_facts: Pushed from June to July 2026
Further tuning: coding performance, token efficiency, long-task handling
Google declined to comment
Single unnamed source

limitations: openai.com primary URL returned HTTP 403; GPT-5.6 details from T3 sources and T2 system card
Anthropic/Alibaba Senate letter not publicly hosted; sourced via CNBC and Bloomberg
Login-walled coverage (X, LinkedIn, Discord) not directly accessed
No independent third-party benchmarks for GPT-5.6 Sol at time of run
Gemini 3.5 Pro delay: single unnamed source, unconfirmed by Google
DeepMind researcher departures: unconfirmed by Google or Anthropic
workflow-automation, productivity-ai, agent-framework, mcp-ecosystem, research-papers had no qualifying in-window releases
suggested_next_runs: GPT-5.6 Sol independent benchmarks (LMSYS Arena, Artificial Analysis)
Anthropic/Alibaba Senate response and bipartisan sanctions bill status
